testsuite.name: com.assetguard.presentation.routes.RetentionRoutesTest

testcase.name: GET nudges returns empty list when no nudges
GET nudges returns 200 with nudges list
GET nudges response contains required fields
GET nudges for ABANDON type has transfer deepLink
GET nudges returns nudges sorted by priority
